name: AeroGlide Wireless Ergonomic Mouse
description: An ergonomic wireless mouse designed to reduce wrist strain. Features a high-precision 16,000 DPI optical sensor, customizable macro buttons, and a silent-click mechanism with up to 50 hours of battery life on a single charge.

name: HydroPeak Double-Walled Water Bottle
description: A vacuum-insulated, stainless steel water bottle that keeps drinks ice-cold for 24 hours or piping hot for 12 hours. Features a leak-proof straw lid and a durable, sweat-free powder coat finish.

name: Lumina RGB LED Smart Light Strip
description: A 16.4ft flexible smart LED strip with voice control capabilities via Alexa and Google Assistant. Supports millions of colors, music sync modes, and custom scheduling through a dedicated mobile app.

name: ZenBrew Pour-Over Coffee Maker Set
description: An elegant borosilicate glass carafe complete with a reusable double-layer stainless steel mesh filter. Engineered to extract the rich oils and subtle flavors of your favorite coffee beans without paper filters.

name: NovaSound Active Noise Cancelling Headphones
description: Premium over-ear headphones featuring hybrid active noise cancellation technology, high-resolution audio drivers, and soft memory foam earcups. Includes a built-in mic for crystal-clear calls and a 40-hour battery life.

name: FlexiCore Non-Slip Yoga Mat
description: An eco-friendly, 6mm extra-thick yoga mat made from textured, non-toxic TPE material. Provides optimal cushioning and superior dual-sided grip for hot yoga, Pilates, and general floor workouts.

name: EverRead E-Ink E-Reader
description: A lightweight 6-inch e-reader featuring a glare-free, paper-like E-ink display. Includes an adjustable warm front light for comfortable night reading, IPX8 waterproof protection, and 8GB of storage for thousands of books.

name: TerraGrip Waterproof Hiking Boots
description: Durable all-weather hiking boots featuring a breathable waterproof membrane, protective toe caps, and a high-traction rubber outsole designed to grip wet and rugged terrain securely.

name: SolCharge Outdoor Portable Power Bank
description: A heavy-duty 20,000mAh external battery pack built for the outdoors. Equipped with a backup solar panel charging array, dual quick-charge USB ports, and an integrated multi-mode LED flashlight.
